presentation.title: Classic Blackjack
presentation.description: The timeless casino card game - hit, stand, double and split your way to 21 without busting. Six decks, dealer stands on soft 17, blackjack pays a full 3:2, and insurance is on offer when the dealer shows an Ace. Just you against the house.

paragraphs: Classic Blackjack is the purest form of the table favourite: get closer to 21 than the dealer without going over. Number cards count their face value, face cards are worth 10, and an Ace is 11 or 1 - whichever helps your hand. A two-card 21 is a 'natural' blackjack and pays a generous 3:2.

Play it your way. Hit for another card, stand to hold, double down to twice your stake for exactly one more card, or split a matching pair into separate hands (up to three). Double after a split is allowed, and when the dealer's upcard is an Ace you can take insurance against a dealer blackjack.

The dealer plays by fixed rules - drawing to 16 and standing on all 17s, including soft 17 - and every card comes from a freshly shuffled six-deck shoe drawn by a certified server-side RNG. The whole round is auditable: the dealer's hole card stays hidden on the server until it's time to reveal.

specs.label: Player Options
values: Double on any two cards (incl. after split)
